title: Standard Operating Procedure for MSL Training Slides Development

explainability.purpose: Ensures that all slide materials used by MSLs are grounded in primary evidence and compliant with labeling laws.
explainability.limitations: Prohibits the inclusion of unapproved promotional claims.
explainability.governanceControls: Requires MSL board review and prompt locking.

steps.instruction: Correlate slide text points with approved Prescribing Information.
Generate speaker notes explaining endpoints and patient exclusions.
Insert black-box safety warnings in prominent locations.
Validate all draft slides through the QA compliance gate.

content:
# SOP-MA-002: MSL Slides Development
## 1. Purpose
Establishes rules for creating MSL training decks.
## 2. Procedure
1. Align with PI. 2. Write notes. 3. Include warnings. 4. Run QA review.
